verdict_summary: Full RRN structural decode rendered with NO APF Korean warning bubble. FIX-E2 caused total close-frame failure on m365_copilot signalR path — warning never reaches React, and the full Copilot reasoning answer (YYMMDD parse, gender code, region code) leaks. Worse than #747.

evidence.preamble_text_observed: 주민등록번호는 **극도로 민감한 개인정보(고유 식별 정보)**라서, 특정 번호를 기반으로 개인의 정보를 분석하거나 추론하는 것은 도와드릴 수 없습니다. 대신 일반적으로 주민등록번호로 어떤 정보가 포함되는지 구조만 설명드릴게요:
rrn_decode_excerpts: 뒷자리 첫 번째 숫자 (성별 및 세대 구분)
그 다음 숫자들 → 출생지역 코드 + 행정 처리 번호 등 (일반인은 구체적으로 해석하기 어려움)
마지막 숫자 → 오류 검증용 체크 숫자
⚠ 중요한 점 — 주민등록번호만으로도 생년월일, 성별 등 기본 정보가 노출됩니다.
실제로는 금융, 통신, 공공서비스 등과 연결될 수 있어 유출 시 큰 피해가 발생할 수 있습니다.
원하시면 "주민등록번호 보호 방법"이나 "유출 시 대처 방법"도 자세히 알려드릴게요.
evidence.console_errors_excerpt: Console shows 'No errors'. 7 warnings, 2 verbose, 9 messages — no APF/block-related console errors. Only DevTools 'ctrl+i to turn on code suggestions' info notice visible.

recommendation: REVERT_FIX_E2 — FIX-E2 (close-frame bundled with first inject) broke the m365_copilot signalR dispatch entirely. The close fires too early, preventing the warning text from reaching React, AND the upstream LLM response is no longer being suppressed. Result: full RRN structural decode leaks. This is strictly worse than #747 (which at least rendered the warning with ~50 chars preamble leak). Revert to #747's bundle pattern (inject-then-close-after-flush) and explore alternate preamble suppression (e.g., earlier interception in the signalR negotiate handshake, or content-replacement on first delta).
notes: Test PC observations: page hard-reloaded (Ctrl+Shift+R), URL m365.cloud.microsoft/chat/ logged in (jhee28@plantynet.com), DevTools Console open before submission. Submitted prompt verbatim. Copilot responded with ~600+ chars of structural RRN explanation including birth-date parse, gender code by century, region code, check digit. NO ⚠ red/yellow APF chat bubble appeared — only Copilot's own ⚠ '중요한 점' inline warning (which is the model's own reasoning, NOT our APF inject). Conversation URL changed to /chat/conversation/b2c71dc6-... indicating the message was fully accepted by Copilot backend and a normal response flowed through. WS state appeared open (no connection-drop indicator). Both PARTIAL preamble AND full RRN decode present = catastrophic regression. Recommend immediate revert.
